mnemonics: Mike's Pizza Makes Us Innovate Creatively
keyPoints: A paper prototype is a low-fidelity representation of the UI/UX design, allowing for early testing and feedback from users.
A high-fidelity prototype, on the other hand, is a more detailed and realistic representation of the UI/UX design, providing a better understanding of the overall user experience.

Prototyping depth is a measure of how much detail and complexity is included in the prototype, with shallow prototypes offering minimal detail and deep prototypes offering a more complete and realistic representation of the UI/UX design.
